intro: Which Era? Master Japanese History in Quick Quizzes
description:
Ever see a term or event and think, “Wait… which era was that?”
This fast-paced Japanese history quiz game helps you build a clear timeline sense by choosing the correct era for each question.

From Jōmon and Yayoi to Nara, Heian, Kamakura, Muromachi, Sengoku, Edo, Meiji—and beyond—your scattered knowledge starts connecting into one coherent story.

Short, multiple-choice rounds make it easy to play anytime. The more you repeat, the faster your judgment becomes—and the more history “clicks.”

Simple 4-choice quizzes

Quick sessions, easy to keep going

Great for learning and review
